summary: Digital Card Label Bug Fix VERIFIED. The fix in /app/frontend/app/thread/[id].tsx correctly handles messages with event_type='congrats_card_sent' that contain digital card content (URLs with /card/, /p/, or text like 'digital business card'). These messages now display as 'Digital Card' label instead of incorrectly showing 'Congrats Card'. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright - labels render correctly for all test scenarios.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: contentLower is defined at line 1504 BEFORE isDigitalCard at line 1506 - fixes reference error
VERIFIED: isDigitalCard detection at line 1506 checks for /card/, /p/, 'digital card', 'digital business card', 'save my contact', and event_type='digital_card_sent'/'digital_card_shared'
VERIFIED: detectedCardType only set to 'congrats' when !isDigitalCard (lines 1529, 1538, 1539) - prevents mislabeling
VERIFIED: Display priority at lines 1559-1563 checks isDigitalCard BEFORE isCongratsCard
VERIFIED: Frontend UI shows 'Digital Card' label for TEST_CARDLABEL_1 (event_type='congrats_card_sent' with 'digital business card' content)
seed_data_creation: Created test messages in conversation 69adbc1c1aac0c754b9916c9 with various event_types and content patterns to verify label detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Digital Card Label Bug Fix verified. Test conversation ID: 69adbc1c1aac0c754b9916c9. Test messages: TEST_CARDLABEL_1 through TEST_CARDLABEL_7 cover all card type scenarios. Thread URL: /thread/69adbc1c1aac0c754b9916c9

bug_fix_verification.issue: Messages with event_type='congrats_card_sent' but digital card content were incorrectly labeled as 'Congrats Card'
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Frontend content-based detection in renderMessage() was falling through to 'Congrats Card' label for historical digital card messages
fix_changes: 1. Moved contentLower definition before isDigitalCard to fix reference error
2. Added !isDigitalCard guards to prevent congrats label on digital card content
3. Changed display priority: isDigitalCard checked BEFORE isCongratsCard
